title: Mob Battle
description: This datapack makes mob battle possible in vanilla Minecraft! You can add mobs in 4 teams and they will fight with each other.
body:
* This datapack makes mob battle possible in vanilla Minecraft! 
* You can add mobs in 4 teams and they will fight with each other!
---
* /team join mcs_team_red @mob
* /team join mcs_team_blue @mob
* /team join mcs_team_green @mob
* /team join mcs_team_yellow @mob
---
* Added New "Battle Banners"
* Use this commands in order to get "Battle Banners"
* Those banners make mobs to join their teams in 16 blocks radius, if mobs aren't in any teams!
* In order to remove "Battle Banner", you have to use Banner remover!
---
* /function .give:mcs_mob_battle/banner_remover 
* /function .give:mcs_mob_battle/blue_banner_spawn_egg
* /function .give:mcs_mob_battle/red_banner_spawn_egg
* /function .give:mcs_mob_battle/green_banner_spawn_egg
* /function .give:mcs_mob_battle/yellow_banner_spawn_egg
---
